llm_verdict.message:
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sed -i '1i/^source \/boot\/grub2\/user\.cfg/d' /boot/grub2/grub.cfg
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sed -i '1i/^set superusers="root"/d' /boot/grub2/grub.cfg
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sed -i '1i/^export superusers/d' /boot/grub2/grub.cfg
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
grub2-mkpasswd-pbkdf2 <<< "BootLoaderP@ssw0rd!2024" 2>/dev/null > /tmp/pbkdf2_hash
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/boot/grub2/user.cfg
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
GRUB2_PASSWORD=$(cat /tmp/pbkdf2_hash)
</parameter>
<parameter=mode>
0600
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/boot/grub2/grub.cfg
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
source /boot/grub2/user.cfg
set superusers="root"
export superusers
password_pbkdf2 root ${GRUB2_PASSWORD}
</parameter>
<parameter=mode>
0644
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/boot/grub2/grub.cfg
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
source /boot/grub2/user.cfg
set superusers="root"
export superusers
password_pbkdf2 root ${GRUB2_PASSWORD}
</parameter>
<parameter=mode>
0644
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/boot/grub2/grub.cfg
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
source /boot/grub2/user.cfg
set superusers="root"
export superusers
password_pbkdf2 root ${GRUB2_PASSWORD}
</parameter>
<parameter=mode>
0644
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
</sequence>
